summary: Recurring Giving Management feature fully tested. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Portal UI working correctly with schedule cards, create modal, and action buttons. Admin UI working correctly with filter tabs, schedule table, and status management actions.
seed_data_creation: Test schedules created during backend tests with TEST_ prefix for cleanup identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recurring Giving feature is complete and working. Backend has 8 endpoints (6 portal + 2 admin) all verified. Portal UI shows RecurringGivingManager component with create modal, schedule cards with Edit/Pause/Resume/Cancel buttons. Admin UI shows AdminRecurringGiving component with filter tabs (All/Active/Paused/Cancelled) and schedule table with Pause/Resume/Cancel actions. SolomonPay payment processing is MOCKED - no real Stripe subscriptions.

admin_recurring_giving.GET /api/admin/recurring-giving: Admin list all recurring schedules with stats - PASS

portal_ui.Create modal elements: PASS - Amount input, fund select, frequency buttons, save button
portal_ui.Schedule cards: PASS - 8 cards displayed with Edit/Pause/Cancel buttons

admin_ui.Schedule table: PASS - 8 rows with Donor, Amount, Frequency, Fund, Next Charge, Status, Actions columns
admin_ui.Action buttons: PASS - Pause/Cancel buttons found on active schedules

mocked_apis.SolomonPay: Payment processing is mocked - donations stay pending, no real Stripe subscription charges
